# Data rate

**Data field**

The required data rate in bits per second, expressed as a 32-bit integer.

## Data fields

- **Size**: The number of bytes in this data rate atom.
- **Type**: The type of this atom.
- **Flags**: A 32-bit integer.

items.description: The number of bytes in this data rate atom.
